title: New Jedi Order era
content:
{{Top|real|njo}}
{{Youmay|the Legends New Jedi Order publishing era|the in-universe [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|Post-Imperial era]] or the canon [[New Jedi Order Era]]}}
{{Otheruses|New Jedi Order}}
[[File:Era-njo.png|right|]]
The '''[[New Jedi Order]] era''' is the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[List of publishing eras|publishing era]] that takes place between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] (the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]) and [[37 ABY]] (the pre-[[Second Galactic Civil War]] period).

==New Jedi Order era==
===[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]===
[[File:NJO-VectorPrime.png|thumb|right|200px|[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime|''Vector Prime'']], first novel of the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'' series]] by [[R. A. Salvatore]]]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''
*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''
*[[Star Wars: Chewbacca (2000)|''Chewbacca'']]
*{{Tales|18|Revenants}}
*[[Star Wars: Invasion: Refugees|''Invasion: Refugees'']]
*[[Star Wars: Invasion: Rescues|''Invasion: Rescues'']]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''
*[[Star Wars: Invasion: Revelations|''Invasion: Revelations'']]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
